emails.subject: 29th floor
emails.body: 29th floor Tana, The suite of offices on 29 will be complete with a fax machine and an additional analog line for P.C. dial-up access by close of business today. The only exception to your requirements is for an additional table in the empty room. I believe that will be in by mid day tomorrow. We will prepare 32 Thursday.

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: RE: 29th floor Weren't we also going to get a printer in the area?

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: Yes it will also be there today.

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: Lance, Can you have your install people mark with a yellow sticky or something where the analog lines for the PCs are located. Much thanks!

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: Will do.

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: You are the best!

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: Lance, I just spoke to Mary Cook and she would like all four areas done by the end of today. Is that doable?

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: I've been advised that its complete but haven't confirmed. I'll let you know in a little bit. Lance D Jameson, PMP Sent by Blackberry Wireless

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: Mary Cook wants me to put together a list of people's home ph, cell no's/pagers, in case we need to call in help during the holidays. Can you provide me with your info in case we get surprised and have to set up additonal data rooms. Much thanks!

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: 281.855.8906 (h) 713.859.9912 (m) Call if you need me. But I really hope you don't need it.

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: I'm on it. I have the Fax and Printers stashed away. I just need to move them up and plug them in. I'll get that done by close of business.

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: RE: 29th floor Room 3259 phone, printer and Fax machine Room 3260 phone Room 32C2 phone and analog line Room 3376 Phone and analog line and printer Room 3371 phone and polycom and fax machine Room 2991 two phones and analog line Room 2993 (hallway) fax machine and analog line Room 2994 phone and printer Room 2946 phone Room 2945 phone and printer and fax machine Room 2947 phone Lance D Jameson, PMP Sent by Blackberry Wireless

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: Thanks Lance!

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: I can't tell the fax numbers on some of the faxes and where the analog lines are. Can you meet with me?

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: The analog lines are tagged right on the user end of the cord with yellow stickies with their extension numbers written on them as you'd asked. I'll have you the fax numbers in a couple minutes. I'm out of the office for a couple of hours. Lance D Jameson, PMP Sent by Blackberry Wireless

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: It appears that the fax you moved in on the 33rd floor was actively being used by Scott Tholan and his assistant on that floor (x58889). Can your people please move it back ASAP and find us another one. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: Will do ASAP. Sorry! Lance D Jameson, PMP Sent by Blackberry Wireless

emails.subject: FW: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: FW: RE: 29th floor Tana, Here are two of the four numbers. I'll have the other two soon. at 2993 the fax number is 713 853 9828 at 2945 the fax number is 713 646 3244

emails.subject: RE: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: RE: RE: 29th floor Any update on these faxes? I have to get my list to Louise Kitchen today. To: Jones, Tana

emails.subject: Fw: RE: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: Fw: RE: RE: 29th floor Lance D Jameson, PMP Sent by Blackberry Wireless

emails.subject: RE: RE: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: RE: RE: RE: 29th floor Lance, Did we replace the fax machine we erroneously took on the 33rd floor?

emails.subject: RE: RE: RE: 29th floor
emails.body: They were instructed to do so. I have not been up to confirm but will do so personally. Lance D Jameson, PMP Sent by Blackberry Wireless
